query:
INSERT INTO well_jobs (serviceLine, platform, wellNumber, jobType, jobDate, productionBefore, productionAfter, production30Days, status, notes)
VALUES
  ('coiled-tubing', 'Platform A', 'A-01', 'Cleanout / Milling', '2026-03-05', 320, 580, 540, 'Successful', 'Sand cleanout performed successfully'),
  ('coiled-tubing', 'Platform B', 'B-03', 'Sand Cleanout', '2026-03-12', 210, 410, 390, 'Successful', 'Production significantly improved after job');
